# docs

## What This Workspace Is
Existing user- and developer-facing docs, including `architecture/data-model.md`.

## What to Load
| Task | Load These | Skip These |
|------|-----------|------------|
| Update architecture notes | `architecture/` | `src/`, `ops/` |
| Write a how-to guide | the feature; the goal for tone | architecture internals |

## What NOT to Do
- Don't duplicate architecture rationale — it lives in `architecture/`.
